data.title: SOL price may hit $153-200 by Jan 2026. Analysts eye targets between $153-$480 in 2026 as bullish momentum continues.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Solana has demonstrated a strong upward trend, trading above important moving averages. Analysts project the price to reach between $153 and $480 by 2026. The current technical analysis indicates a likelihood of further gains in the near future.

data.title: Nexans aims to be the leading player in electrification, revealing new Executive Committee organization.
data.description: In a move to cement its position as the leading global player in electrification, Nexans has introduced a revamped Executive Committee structure. This strategic change comes as Nexans aims to consolidate its status in the realm of electrification technologies. The restructuring of the Executive Committee signifies Nexans' commitment to innovation and growth in the industry. This reshuffle underscores Nexans' dedication to staying at the forefront of the rapidly evolving electrification sector.

data.title: Shift from AI hype to realism: Organizations increasing AI investments for long-term value. Capgemini report suggests focus on governance, skills, and human-AI chemistry to fully benefit. Paris, Jan 15, 2026.
data.description: Paris, Jan 15, 2026 - Recent findings reveal a shift in the mindset of business leaders regarding AI strategies post the 'AI hype' era. A report by the Capgemini Research Institute titled "The multi-year AI advantage: Building the enterprise of tomorrow" highlights this change. Incorporating AI into decision-making processes has become more prevalent among organizations. Additionally, a spotlight report titled "How AI is quietly reshaping executive decisions" was released. It is projected that in 2026, organizations will need to focus on governance, skills, accountability, and fostering a symbiotic relationship between humans and AI to fully leverage the transformative potential of AI.

data.title: Alstom to supply 26 Coradia Max trains to Baden-Württemberg, valued at around 500 million euros. Delivery by late 2028.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, Alstom, a top player in smart and sustainable mobility, secured a deal to provide 26 more double-decker trains of the Coradia Max model to Landesanstalt Schienenfahrzeuge Baden-Württemberg (SFBW). Alongside the train order, there is an agreement in place for the maintenance of these trains until 2055. This deal, encompassing the 26 new trains and the long-term maintenance service, amounts to approximately 500 million euros. The delivery of these trains is anticipated to take place between mid and late 2028.

data.title: E3 Lithium provides battery-grade lithium carbonate from its program to partners globally. Important step for securing agreements.
data.description: E3 Lithium Ltd., a prominent Canadian lithium development company traded on TSXV, FSE, and OTCQX under tickers ETL, OW3, and EEMMF respectively, has successfully produced battery-grade lithium carbonate from its Demonstration program. The company is supplying this product to various parties in line with its strategy to secure long-term offtake agreements and collaborate with strategic partners. This achievement signifies a significant advancement in E3's commercial process, demonstrating its commitment to the development of the lithium sector.

data.title: GCCL and OPIS signed MOU to advance clinical trials; GCCL provides analysis in South Korea, OPIS is a global CRO.
data.description: In Yongin, South Korea on January 15, 2026, GCCL, a prominent clinical trial sample analysis provider in the country, entered a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with OPIS, a worldwide full-service contract research organization (CRO). This partnership was established during the 44th Annual J.P. conference.

data.title: Electrolux Group to release Q4 2025 results on Jan 30, 2026, at 07:00 CET. Webcast and conference for media, investors, and analysts.
data.description: On January 30, 2026, the Electrolux Group is set to release its fourth-quarter results for 2025 at around 07:00 CET. Media, investors, and analysts are encouraged to attend a live video webcast and telephone conference on the same day.

data.title: ADA price tests $0.42 resistance, eyes $0.38 support. At $0.40 now, with RSI neutral and MACD bearish. Technicals hint at possible swing.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Cardano is currently being traded at $0.40, with the Relative Strength Index (RSI) indicating a neutral stance and the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) showing bearish signals. Analysts predict that the price may either test the resistance level at $0.42 or fall to the support level at $0.38. This suggests a possible fluctuation in its value in the near future.

data.title: Faraday Future to launch EAI Robotics Product on Feb 4, 2026, in Las Vegas during NADA Show, inviting attendees.
data.description: Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc., a California-based global shared intelligent electric mobility ecosystem company, will be unveiling its FF EAI Robotics Product on February 4, 2026, at the National Automobile Dealers Association Show in Las Vegas, NV. This event is a significant milestone for the company, coinciding with the annual NADA Show. Faraday Future, listed as (NASDAQ: FFAI), welcomes NADA attendees to participate in the FF EAI Robotics Product Final Launch & FX Partner Recruitment Event on this date.

data.title: RF Industries (RFIL) surged 21% in after-hours trading to $8.72 post Q4 report showing a 23% revenue increase to $22.7 million.
data.description: RF Industries Ltd. (NASDAQ: RFIL) saw a significant 20.94% increase in its shares during after-hours trading on Wednesday, reaching $8.72, following the release of its fourth-quarter fiscal 2025 earnings report. The San Diego-based company reported a remarkable 23% growth in net sales for the fourth quarter, reaching $22.7 million, up from $18.5 million in the previous year and a 15% increase from $19.8 million in the third quarter of fiscal 2025. In terms of net income, RF Industries reported consolidated earnings of $174,000, or $0.02 per diluted share, a notable improvement from a net loss of $238,000, or $0.02 per diluted share, in the same quarter of the prior year. Additionally, the company's non-GAAP net income stood at $2.1 million, or 20 cents per diluted share. For more details, the complete story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Keurig Dr Pepper launches offer for JDE Peet's shares, joint press release with Kodiak BidCo B.V., pursuant to Dutch regulations.
data.description: Keurig Dr Pepper Inc., Kodiak BidCo B.V., and JDE Peet's N.V. have issued a joint press release in accordance with the Dutch Decree on public takeover bids. The press release is made under Article 10, paragraph 3 and Article 18, paragraph 3 of the Decree.

data.title: US defense contractor awards Sivers Semiconductors $800K for next-gen chip for defense systems.
data.description: Sivers Semiconductors AB, based in KISTA, Sweden, recently secured a contract worth $800,000. The company, known for its expertise in photonics and wireless technologies, will utilize this funding to develop a next-generation chip that will enhance intelligent and resilient software-defined defense systems. This announcement was made on January 15, 2026.
